kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Chisel goes with exactly four of Godfrey, Fletcher, Millpond, Bishop, and 13 coins.
The artisan with the Awl's levy is between the artisan serving the Earl and the Fletcher.
The artisan with the Chisel's levy is between the artisan in Millpond and Matilda.
The Potter's levy is immediately next to the artisan with the Awl.
The artisan with the Chisel's levy is exactly 2 coins more than Aldric.
The artisan with the Needle's levy is exactly 2 coins more than the artisan in Bridgegate.
Exactly one of the artisan serving the Bishop, the artisan serving the Duke, and the artisan with 14 coins belongs to the Ironmongers' Guild.
The Fletcher and the Weaver are in the same ward.
The artisan in Riverside's levy is at least 2 coins more than Wulfric.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Spoon goes with exactly four of Dale, Catfish, Pinehollow, Leech, and 8 lb.
The angler using the Spinnerbait's weight is between the angler fishing with Shrimp and the angler who landed the Catfish.
The angler using the Spoon's weight is between the angler at Pinehollow and Gus.
The angler who landed the Crappie's weight is immediately next to the angler using the Spinnerbait.
The angler using the Spoon's weight is exactly 4 lb more than Cody.
The angler using the Wobbler's weight is exactly 4 lb more than the angler at Mossbank.
Exactly one of the angler fishing with Leech, the angler fishing with Nightcrawler, and the catch with 10 lb belongs to the Sunfish Family.
The angler who landed the Catfish and the angler who landed the Perch are in the same watershed.
The angler at Willowmere's weight is at least 4 lb more than Royce.
